title: Application Error Rate by Service
description: Monitors ERROR-level application logs across CRM Portal and Drone Shop, grouped by service and endpoint. High error rates indicate application health issues requiring investigation.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Severity Level' = 'ERROR' | stats count as Errors by 'Service Name', 'URI Path', 'Error Type' | sort -Errors

ask_ai_prompts: Summarize which services and endpoints are driving the current error volume.
Identify whether one error type is dominating this service-level error distribution.
